activities_projects.title: Pre-Reading Discussion on Rain
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to share personal experiences about rain
steps: Ask students if they have ever waited for the rains
Discuss how people feel when rain arrives after a long dry period
Students share experiences in pairs
Discuss responses with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect personal experiences with the theme of the story

activities_projects.title: Understanding Farmers’ Dependence on Rain
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of rain in farming
steps: Read the section describing Velu and his farming work
Discuss why farmers depend on rainfall
List the problems farmers face without rain
Share findings with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the connection between rain and agriculture
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of farming challenges (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Study of Velu
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the character of Velu in the story
steps: Read the first section of the story carefully
Identify Velu’s feelings while waiting for rain
List his qualities as a hardworking farmer
Present the character traits in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn character analysis and empathy for farmers
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of explanation and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Story
activities_projects.objective: Improve vocabulary related to weather and farming
steps: Identify new words from the chapter
Write meanings in the notebook
Use the words in sentences
Share sentences with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance vocabulary and language skills

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion – Waiting
steps: Form small groups
Discuss what people do while waiting for something important
Talk about feelings during waiting periods
Present group ideas to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop communication and reflection skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and clarity of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Picture Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Interpret visual images related to drought
steps: Observe the picture showing dry land and the sun
Describe what is happening in the picture
Write a short paragraph explaining the scene
Discuss the effects of drought
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop observation and descriptive writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and creativity in description (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the impact of lack of rainfall
steps: List events in the story where rain does not arrive
Write the consequences faced by Velu and other farmers
Create a cause-effect chart
Share charts with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand logical relationships between events

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Farmer Waiting for Rain
steps: Form groups of 3–4 students
Assign roles such as Velu, villagers, or narrator
Act out a scene where farmers discuss the delayed rain
Perform before the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve confidence and communication skills

activities_projects.title: Weather and Climate Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of monsoon in India
steps: Discuss what monsoon means
Explain why it is important for farmers
Identify regions dependent on rainfall
Write a short summary
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain awareness of environmental and climatic factors

activities_projects.title: Creative Writing – Waiting for Rain
steps: Imagine you are a farmer waiting for rain
Write a short story describing your feelings
Include details about weather, land, and hopes
Share the story with the teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve creative writing and empathy
